name: Assau!t
short_description: The new Assau!t is a PICO-8 defense first-person shooter. These scary enemies that are coming to you.. All we have to do is stop the approaching enemies. Shoot! Shoot!
detailed_description:
Assau!t is back with PICO-8 based retro FPS.
Assau!t is a defensive FPS game in which you have to stop charging enemies to invade the player's territory.

(Old) Synopsis

It is 2084, the continent of UNAT where a huge civilization exists. Due to the unstable international community on the continent of UNAT, soldiers in black camouflage called counter-terrorist "anonymous" are causing armed terrorism.

You have armed yourself to avoid being beaten by anonymous forces. Will you ever survive the anonymous army for a long time?
